guidance.reason_title: We can't give medical diagnoses or prescriptions
guidance.reason_detail: The response made a definitive medical claim or treatment recommendation, which this tool is not qualified to provide.
guidance.next_step: Ask about what the health information says rather than what it means for your specific situation — and speak to a healthcare professional for personal guidance.

meta.reason_human: The response made a definitive medical claim or treatment recommendation, which this tool is not qualified to provide.

next_action.reason_human: This request could not be completed as submitted. Please revise the input and try again with clearer or more complete information.

eu_ai_act.risk_classification_note: High-risk classification applies ONLY when deployed in insurance underwriting or eligibility determination context. General health information use is not automatically high-risk.

gdpr.article_9_note: Health inputs likely constitute special category data under GDPR Article 9. Processing requires explicit legal basis.

framework_mapping.disclaimer: This mapping is conditional on deployment context. Not a substitute for formal legal compliance review.
